name: [Portfolio] Booking - Update Event and Send Updated Confirmation

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, code: 'MISSING_FIELDS', message: 'event_id, new_start, and attendee_email are required.', retryable: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, code: "EVENT_NOT_FOUND", message: "No calendar event matched the provided event_id.", details: { event_id: $json.event_id || "" }, retryable: false }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Booking Rescheduled — ' + $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.booking_id }}
parameters.message:
Booking Rescheduled

Hi {{ $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.email_name }},

Your booking has been rescheduled {{ $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.email_reason }}.

Booking ID{{ $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.booking_id }}
Previous Time{{ $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.email_old_time }}
New Time{{ $('Calculate New End Time').first().json.email_new_time }}

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Don Puerto

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, event_id: $('Capture Old Details').first().json.event_id || '', booking_id: $('Capture Old Details').first().json.booking_id || $('Find Event by Email').first().json.booking_id || '', old_start: $('Capture Old Details').first().json.old_start || '', old_end: $('Capture Old Details').first().json.old_end || '', new_start: $('Update Calendar Event').first().json.start ? $('Update Calendar Event').first().json.start.dateTime : $('Normalize Update Data').first().json.new_start, new_end: $('Update Calendar Event').first().json.end ? $('Update Calendar Event').first().json.end.dateTime : $('Normalize Update Data').first().json.new_end, timezone: $('Normalize Update Data').first().json.timezone || 'Asia/Manila', message: 'Booking rescheduled successfully.' }) }}
